flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Ross Medical Education Center-Brighton fell 34% between 2021 and 2024 (81.2% → 53.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 17 pp at Ross Medical Education Center-Brighton vs the 2003–2007 baseline (65.5% vs 82.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ross Medical Education Center-Brighton fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Ross Medical Education Center-Brighton rose 34% between 2021 and 2024 (29 → 39).
